With a ticket to the Satsuki Sho on the line, the racers 
round the first corner and head for the second.

The pace is fast. Narita Taishin is second from last. Today's 
favorite, Winning Ticket, is moving along at the rear.
Her speed is crazy! But I'm not gonna lose my cool!

Ticket's doing pretty good saving her energy. Looks like 
her training's paid off.

They're entering the backstretch with ten lengths between 
the leader and the back. Narita Taishin and Winning Ticket 
remain in the rear.
Don't get impatient, you two…

The front pack is approaching the last corner! The entire 
pack has tightened up! Who will break out into the lead?!
Now!

Look at this! Winning Ticket is zooming ahead! Narita 
Taishin makes her move too! They've closed the gap with 
the front!
Taishin's thinking the same thing! But… I won't lose!

Winning Ticket is out wide, with Narita Taishin right beside 
her! The two favorites are shoulder to shoulder in the final 
stretch!

I've trained like hell… to get to this race and run beside 
you!
Gotta get in front!

Winning Ticket pulls ahead! Winning Ticket takes the lead! 
But Narita Taishin is hot on her heels!
Will it be Winning Ticket?! Or will it be Narita Taishin?!
URAAAGH!

Winning Ticket takes the wiiin! Narita Taishin places 
second!
Phew…

This is Winning Ticket's fourth consecutive win! What a 
spectacular race!
Huff, huff…
